title: BAT leak in some aggregate queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (id Int32, value String NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE b (id Int32, value String DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO b (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'test3');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM a UNION ALL SELECT * FROM b) AS z;
key_bug_features: counting from union all in aggregate queries
